label: Compass
description:
Shoot a red arrow indicating North on shake
(required for 'NORTH STAR' trophy)

label: Compass (not present on Pebble 2)
description:
Shoot a red arrow indicating North on shake

label: Accelerometer
description:
Check orientation and motion on each shot
(required for 'PERFECT SETUP' trophy)

label: Seconds arrow
description:
Shoot an arrow every second.
WARNING: HIGH POWER USAGE!
